hero.headline: Building Scalable Enterprise Applications
hero.description: Frontend Angular Developer with 3.7+ years of experience delivering enterprise portals, government systems, dashboards, and high-performance web applications using Angular, TypeScript, RxJS, Node.js, and Ionic.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm Rabin R, a Frontend Angular Developer specializing in scalable enterprise applications, government portals, dashboard systems, and modern web solutions.
bio: With 4+ years of professional experience, I build responsive, high-performance applications using Angular 17–21, TypeScript, RxJS, Angular Signals, Node.js, Ionic, and REST APIs. I have worked on enterprise-grade systems including immigration management portals, pension management systems, and mobile-first applications used by thousands of users.

Currently freelancing — delivering scalable frontend solutions, UI systems, and enterprise Angular applications for clients globally. My focus is on clean architecture, reusable component systems, frontend performance optimization, secure API integration, and exceptional user experience.

experience.title: A track record of shipping enterprise software
experience.subtitle: From government immigration platforms to large multi-step pension applications, here is where my craft has been forged.

achievements: Delivering end-to-end Angular web applications for international clients
Architecting scalable frontend systems with Angular 19–21 and standalone components
Building performant dashboards, admin panels, and enterprise UI systems
Integrating REST APIs, JWT authentication, and role-based access control (RBAC)
Developing cross-platform mobile apps using Ionic Angular & Capacitor
Providing performance audits and Angular migration from legacy versions
Collaborating with global teams using Agile workflows and Git-based CI/CD
Developed enterprise Angular applications for government and business platforms
Integrated secure REST APIs and JWT authentication
Improved application performance using Angular Signals and RxJS
Developed reusable frontend architecture and UI systems
Optimized API requests and frontend rendering performance

skills.title: A modern toolkit, mastered in production
skills.subtitle: Curated stack I rely on every day to ship reliable, performant, and secure web & mobile experiences.

projects.title: Selected work — enterprise, government & mobile
projects.subtitle: A peek at recent products I've helped design, engineer, and ship. Each one balances scalable architecture with refined UI.

featured.name: Fiji Immigration Department Portal
featured.description: Enterprise immigration management platform developed for government workflows including external user portals, internal staff portals, police verification systems, and secure payment gateway integration.
featured.highlights: Multi-step enterprise workflow systems, Secure authentication & RBAC, Responsive government portal UI, High-performance Angular architecture, REST API integration.

grid.alt: PRIMS — Pension & Retirement Information Management System
grid.name: PRIMS — Pension & Retirement Information Management System
grid.description: High-performance pension and retirement dashboard system designed for enterprise administration and scalable data workflows.
grid.highlights: Zoneless Angular architecture, Optimized rendering strategies, Dashboard analytics UI, API optimization & caching, Reusable enterprise components.

grid.name: VNPF — Vanuatu National Provident Fund
grid.description: Cross-platform mobile application developed using Ionic Angular with biometric authentication and optimized mobile workflows.
grid.highlights: Android & iOS support, Face ID & Touch ID integration, Responsive mobile-first design, Low-bandwidth API optimization, Hybrid mobile application architecture.
